steps.title: This protocol performs a dilution on...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs a dilution on custom tuberacks with 2x P1000 pipettes in tandem. The deck layout is shown below: ---

steps.title: Pipette 1 aspirates 700µL from tube...
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 aspirates 700µL from tube at position 1 on rack 1 with air gap

steps.title: Pipette 2 aspirates 700µL from tube...
steps.instruction: Pipette 2 aspirates 700µL from tube at position 2 on rack 1 with air gap

steps.title: Pipette 1 dispenses full volume into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 dispenses full volume into tube at position 1 on rack 3

steps.title: Pipette 1 aspirates 800 µL from mixed dilution tube
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 aspirates 800 µL from mixed dilution tube

steps.title: Pipette 1 dispenses full volume into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 dispenses full volume into vial at position 1 on HPLC rack at deck position 11

steps.title: Pipette 2 dispenses full volume into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 2 dispenses full volume into tube at position 2 on rack 3

steps.title: Pipette 2 aspirates 800 µL from mixed dilution tube
steps.instruction: Pipette 2 aspirates 800 µL from mixed dilution tube

steps.title: Pipette 2 dispenses full volume into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 2 dispenses full volume into vial at position 2 on HPLC rack at deck position 11

steps.title: Pipette 1&2 discard tips in waste tray
steps.instruction: Pipette 1&2 discard tips in waste tray

steps.title: Steps 1-12 are repeated for as...
steps.instruction: Steps 1-12 are repeated for as many samples as specified, pausing for refills if more than 48 samples are input.
